series_metadata.series_description: These files contain applications for a Money Transmitter license, change of control applications, security devices including letters of cancellation, written reports of specified events, and termination plans according to which a licensee ceases to conduct business in Ohio.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after licensee ceases conducting business in Ohio, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
